framework.name: Merchant Category Code (MCC) Filtering via Allow/Block Lists
framework.description: Stripe implements MCC-based authorization through mutually exclusive allowed_categories and blocked_categories arrays. Categories use Stripe's taxonomy (e.g., 'car_rental_agencies', 'fast_food_restaurants') rather than standard ISO 18245 MCC codes in documentation.
framework.raw_quote: You can set... allowed_categories array: List of categories of authorizations to allow. All other categories will be blocked. blocked_categories array: List of categories of authorizations to decline.
